perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with black glasses, a black t-shirt, and a grey backpack stands on a high balcony or rooftop, speaking excitedly to the camera while wearing a blue vivo lanyard. (2) He gestures with his hand and then points toward the urban landscape below, which includes a park, construction sites with cranes, and a distant river. (3) He holds up a smartphone (vivo X300 Pro) displaying a camera view that is digitally zooming in on a delivery person riding a scooter in the park far below. (4) The phone's screen reveals extreme detail, showing the delivery person looking at their own phone, while the man on screen continues to comment and express amazement. (5) The camera pans between the man's face and the zoomed-in phone screen to emphasize the distance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin Chinese, accompanied by prominent ambient wind noise and distant city sounds. (2) A second male voice (off-camera) joins the conversation, asking questions and reacting with surprise. (3) The dialogue becomes a back-and-forth exchange of exclamations as they observe the camera's zoom power. (4) No background music is present; the audio consists entirely of field-recorded dialogue and environmental noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'vivo X300 Pro' and 'ZEISS' are visible on the smartphone's camera interface overlay. (2) Functional Text: Camera parameters like '2428mm', 'f/2.67', and 'ISO 50' appear on the phone screen. (3) Decorative Text: 'vivo Brave New Origin' is printed on the man's lanyard.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Zoom Demonstration -> Peer Reaction -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 1 person visible in the distance via the phone zoom, 1 cameraman partially visible in reflections.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male, wearing black-rimmed glasses, a black T-shirt, a grey backpack, and a blue vivo brand lanyard.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern urban skyline with high-rise residential buildings, construction cranes, a park with manicured bushes and trees, a river in the background, and a blue safety barrier on a nearby construction site.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a live demonstration of the telephoto zoom capabilities of the vivo X300 Pro smartphone. It aims to impress the audience by showing how a person far away in a park can be seen clearly (even what is on their phone screen) using the device's camera.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Host is wearing a vivo brand lanyard and explicitly identifies and demonstrates the product by name.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tech influencer style with high-energy dialogue and 'hidden gem' discovery format.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'caught in the act' zoom-in demonstration, which is a popular trope for showing off high-end smartphone cameras.
